title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank offers loans against securities for the liquidity of your long term investments. You don’t need to lock your long term investment. Facility is renewable depending on the performance of the account. What makes it more attractive is that you pay interest only on the amount utilized.
  * Equity Shares – Dematerialize Shares upto 50% of the market value
  * Kisan Vikas Patra (KVP) (Margin 20 % of accrued value)


  * Loan Against Shares: Loan against Shares is an overdraft facility against your dematerialized shares. You can offer to pledge your eligible securities as per the Bank's approved list in order to avail of this facility.
  * Loan Against Life Insurance Policy: Your solution to short-term fund requirement. You can offer to assign your eligible Life Insurance Policy in favor of IDBI Bank in order to avail of this facility.


  * Loan against NSC/KVP : Your solution to short-term fund requirement. Loan Against NSC/KVP is an overdraft facility against your NSC/KVP




Call on our Phone Banking numbers Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI bank provides Loan Against Securities for your long term investments to maximize your returns. Now unlock the potential of your securities by availing a loan against them.
